backend_rationale: No OpenSpec in this project. Single-tool (Claude Code) execution with progress.json bookkeeping. Hybrid not warranted at this scale.

next_action.description: Execute change m6-dashboard-localstorage-shim (M6): read-old/write-new localStorage shim in crates/librefang-api/dashboard/src/api.ts — getApiKey() reads bossfang-api-key first, falls back to librefang-api-key and promotes on hit; setApiKey() writes only bossfang-api-key and removes librefang-api-key. 4 call sites (lines ~1019, ~1020, ~3339, ~3340, ~3347, ~3348).

phase_progress: 6/7 milestones done (M1, M2, M3, M4, M5, M7). Next: M6 (dashboard localStorage shim).
